_comment: Amazon S3 bucket policy for model artifacts. IMPORTANT: This policy must be used in conjunction with S3 Block Public Access settings enabled at the account and bucket level. See docs/SECURITY.md for Block Public Access configuration requirements.

Statement._justification: DENY statement with s3:* is intentional security control to block ALL non-HTTPS requests. This is a restrictive policy, not a permissive one.
DENY statement with s3:* is intentional security control to block ALL requests using TLS versions below 1.2. This is a restrictive policy, not a permissive one.
